results.title: Iran Accuses US of Violating Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding
results.description: Iran’s Foreign Ministry, in response to US military strikes on its positions, has accused Washington of violating the Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding. The Mehr News Agency reported on Sunday, June 28, that Iran’s Foreign Ministry condemned the early morning US airstrikes. According to the report, Iran’s Foreign Ministry said that the US airstrikes constitute a [...] The post Iran Accuses US of Violating Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding appeared first on Hasht-e Subh .

results.title: Manipur: Kuki-Zo body urges govt to remove highway blockades by Naga groups
results.description: In a statement, the Committee on Tribal Unity (CoTU) said that following joint deliberation with all civil society organisations (CSOs) of Kangpokpi, it unanimously resolved to "serve a 48-hour ultimatum", effective from Sunday midnight, for removing all blockades.

results.title: Ugandan army chief orders the closure of a major news platform
results.description: Uganda's military chief and son of President Yoweri Museveni has ordered the shutdown of a major news organization. On Sunday, soldiers were deployed outside the Kampala offices of the Daily Monitor...

results.title: Goodbye Yesterday: Embracing Change and Moving Forward
results.description: Introduction to the concept of change and why it can be difficult Change is the one constant in life, yet it often feels like an unwelcome guest. We cling to yesterday’s comforts and familiar routines, fearing what lies ahead. But change can be a powerful force for growth if we learn to embrace it rather ... results.title: Two dead in a car accident in Poblenou: one of the vehicles was fleeing from the police
results.description: Two men have died in a tragic road accident this Sunday morning in Barcelona. According to police sources, a vehicle fleeing the police rear-ended another car that was stopped at a traffic light. The driver of the car being driven recklessly and the driver of the stopped car have both lost their lives in the accident. The passenger in the second vehicle was also injured. It all happened at the intersection of Pallars and Fluvià streets in Barcelona, in Poblenou.

results.title: Karnataka CM Shivakumar warns of ban on pan masala, gutka containing narcotic substances
results.description: Karnataka Chief Minister D K Shivakumar has vowed to ban pan masala and gutka if found laced with intoxicating substances, warning manufacturers of strict action. Addressing a conclave, he urged students and healthcare professionals to champion a drug-free state, emphasizing the growing threat of addiction among youth. The government is intensifying anti-drug measures, especially in educational institutions, to secure the nation's future.

results.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Decreases Stock Position in Carlisle Companies Incorporated $CSL
results.description: SG Americas Securities LLC trimmed its position in shares of Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL – Free Report) by 71.2% in the first quarter, Holdings Channel.com reports. The firm owned 26,291 shares of the conglomerate’s stock after selling 64,879 shares during the period. SG Americas Securities LLC’s holdings in Carlisle Companies were worth $8,771,000 as of [...]
